name: Spiced Baked Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the low-fat milk, melted margarine, egg substitute, and vanilla extract until just combined.
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just mixed.
4. Grease a mini bundt pan with cooking spray.
5. Spoon 2 heaping tablespoons of batter into each cavity in the prepared pan.
6. Smooth the tops of the doughnuts with a knife.
7. Bake at 400°F for 12 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from the pan immediately and repeat with remaining batter.
9. Dust the cooled doughnuts with powdered sugar.
Note: You can substitute 2 egg whites for the egg substitute, use canola oil instead of margarine, and no-fat buttermilk instead of low-fat milk. Each serving contains approximately 154 calories.
